profile.name: lossless-cut

intro.title: <div align="center">
intro.desc: The swiss army knife of lossless video/audio editing.

features: Lossless cutting of most video and audio formats
Losslessly cut out parts of video/audio (for cutting away commercials etc.)
Losslessly rearrange the order of video/audio segments
Lossless merge/concatenation of arbitrary files (with identical codecs parameters, e.g. from the same camera)
profile.one: The swiss army knife of lossless video/audio editing
